chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-500 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objection No.1 to 7 a/w reply of counsel as flag “A”. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.07.2025 Mr. Ghulam Parwar, Advocate for the petitioner along with petitioner. SIP Abdul Fateh Chandio, Addl. SHO P.S Naseerabad, District Qambar Shahdadkot. DSP Sachal Muhammad Siddique, on behalf of SSP East, Karachi SIP Muhammad Nawaz Laghari, SHO, Sachal, Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Petitioner through instant petition has prayed as follows:- a. Direct Respondents No.1 & 2 to provide legal protection to the Petitioner and her children family, as she is entitled to the same under Articles, 9, 10, 18, 23 & 24 of the Constitution of Pakistan, 1973, in light of the imminent threats posed by Respondent No.07. b. Direct Respondent No.02 to pass instruction to the police station not to lodge harass the petitioner. c. Restrain Respondent No.07, their agents, representatives, accomplices and any other persons acting on their behalf from harassing, intimidating, or threatening the petitioner and her children in any manner whatsoever. On notice, respondent No.3, SSP East, Karachi, respondent No.5, SHO, P.S Sachal, respondent No.6, SHO P.S Naseerabad District Shahdadkot have appeared and filed replies, submitting that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner and there is a dispute between respondent No.7 and the husband of the petitioner wherein the respondent No.7 has registered an FIR No.43/2025 under Section-302 PPC against the husband of the petitioner at Police Station Naseerabad and he is absconding.

Restrain Respondent No.07, their agents, representatives, accomplices and any other persons acting on their behalf from harassing, intimidating, or threatening the petitioner and her children in any manner whatsoever. On notice, respondent No.3, SSP East, Karachi, respondent No.5, SHO, P.S Sachal, respondent No.6, SHO P.S Naseerabad District Shahdadkot have appeared and filed replies, submitting that no harassment has been caused to the petitioner and there is a dispute between respondent No.7 and the husband of the petitioner wherein the respondent No.7 has registered an FIR No.43/2025 under Section-302 PPC against the husband of the petitioner at Police Station Naseerabad and he is absconding. Though no case of the harassment is made out as the police is investigating an FIR registered under Section-302 PPC, since the 2 petitioner claimed that she has been harassed and humiliated, it is the mandate of the law that the police can arrest a person if he is found involved in any criminal case but on such account cannot arrest womenfolk of the accused. The respondents, SHO, P.S Sachal and SHO, P.S Naseerabad are directed to provide protection to the petitioner and conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
